vBRIEFInfo.author: agent:claude-opus-4.8
vBRIEFInfo.description: Scope vBRIEF: refresh the weather every 4 minutes when the temperature is within 5F of freezing (or colder), instead of the standard 15-minute cadence

narratives.Overview: The ride screen weather refreshes on a fixed 15-minute timer while foregrounded (WeatherController). Near freezing, conditions and icing risk can change quickly, so riders benefit from fresher data.
narratives.Problem: A 15-minute cadence can leave a rider with stale temperature/icing information in exactly the conditions where it matters most — at or near freezing.
narratives.Goals:
1. When the current temperature is within 5F of freezing (32F) or colder, refresh every 4 minutes.
2. Otherwise keep the standard 15-minute cadence.
3. Stay within Open-Meteo's free-tier rate limits (10,000/day, 5,000/hour, 600/min).
narratives.FunctionalRequirements:
FR-1: When the latest reading is at or below 37F (freezing 32F + 5F margin), or the Celsius equivalent, the refresh interval MUST be 4 minutes.
FR-2: When the latest reading is above that threshold, the refresh interval MUST be the standard 15 minutes.
FR-3: The cadence MUST adapt automatically as readings cross the threshold in either direction, without requiring app restart.
FR-4: The fast cadence MUST remain well within Open-Meteo free-tier limits (one lightweight call per refresh; ~15 calls/hour only while foregrounded).
narratives.Architecture: Add a pure isNearOrBelowFreezing flag to WeatherSnapshot, computed from the canonical Fahrenheit value vs. a freezing point (32F) plus a near-freezing margin (5F). WeatherController gains two named intervals (standardRefreshInterval=900s, nearFreezingRefreshInterval=240s) and reschedules its repeating timer to the interval implied by the most recent snapshot after every successful fetch. The currently-active interval is exposed (private(set)) for testing.
narratives.TestingStrategy: Unit-test WeatherSnapshot.isNearOrBelowFreezing across boundaries in F and C (38F->false, 37F->true, 33F->true, 0F->true; 3C->false, 2C->true). Unit-test WeatherController selects the 4-minute interval after a near-freezing snapshot and the 15-minute interval after a warm snapshot, using the existing fake provider.

items.title: Near-freezing detection on the snapshot model

narrative.Acceptance: WeatherSnapshot exposes isNearOrBelowFreezing, true at or below freezing+5F (canonical Fahrenheit), with unit-tested boundaries in F and C.
WeatherController refreshes every 4 minutes when the latest snapshot is near/below freezing and every 15 minutes otherwise, adapting automatically as readings cross the threshold.
Tests confirm the active interval is 240s after a near-freezing reading and 900s after a warm reading.
